scope_description: Supply, erection, and commissioning of waste heat recovery system for BF#3 exhaust gas
capacity_requirements: Minimum 3 MW power recovery from 250°C gas at 180000 Nm3/hr flow
technical_specs: Gas inlet temp: 250±20°C; Pressure drop <25 mbar; Dust loading <50 mg/Nm3 post-cleaning; Steam conditions: 40 bar/400°C
evaluation_criteria: 60% Technical / 40% Commercial; Must have 2+ BF WHRS references
special_conditions: Performance guarantee with penalty: -0.5% contract value per 0.1 MW shortfall; LD for delay: 0.5%/week max 10%

scope_description: EPC for cement kiln waste heat recovery and ESP replacement for Unit 5 clinker line
capacity_requirements: 3.5 MW from preheater + cooler exhaust; ESP upgrade to <30 mg/Nm3
technical_specs: Preheater exit gas: 320°C; AQC exit: 350°C; Combined flow: 250000 Nm3/hr; ESP inlet loading: 50 g/Nm3
evaluation_criteria: 50% Technical / 50% Commercial; Delivery speed weighted at 15% within technical score
special_conditions: Bonus for early delivery: 1% per month up to 3 months; LD: 1%/week max 8%

project_name: Clean Utility System — Goa API Plant
scope_description: Integrated clean utility package: absorption chiller + HPSG boiler + steam distribution
capacity_requirements: Cooling: 500 TR absorption chiller; Steam: 10 TPH HPSG boiler at 10.5 bar; Hot water: 2000 LPH at 80°C
technical_specs: Pharma-grade steam; Chiller COP ≥ 1.35; NOx <30 ppm; Noise <75 dB at 1m; GMP-compliant installation
delivery_location: Cipla Goa Plant, Verna Industrial Estate
evaluation_criteria: 70% Technical / 30% Commercial; Pharma installation references mandatory
special_conditions: cGMP documentation required; FAT at Thermax before dispatch; SAT with Cipla QA team

scope_description: Design, supply, installation, and commissioning of limestone-gypsum wet FGD for 3x500 MW units
capacity_requirements: SO2 removal ≥ 95%; outlet SO2 <200 mg/Nm3; limestone consumption: auto-optimized
technical_specs: Flue gas flow: 1.8 million Nm3/hr per unit; Inlet SO2: 2000-2500 mg/Nm3; Pressure drop <25 mbar; Gypsum quality: ≥90% CaSO4·2H2O
evaluation_criteria: 70% Technical / 30% Commercial; Prior FGD installations for units ≥ 500 MW mandatory
special_conditions: CERC tariff norms applicable; Milestone-based payment: 10% advance, 60% dispatch, 20% erection, 10% commissioning

scope_description: Zero liquid discharge system for textile dyeing effluent with 85% water recovery
capacity_requirements: Effluent flow: 800 KLD; TDS inlet: 15000 mg/L; Recovery target: 85% as reusable water
technical_specs: RO permeate TDS < 500 mg/L; MEE + crystallizer for reject; Chemical sludge: <5% of feed volume; Auto-CIP system required
evaluation_criteria: 50% Technical / 50% Commercial; Prior ZLD references in textile sector mandatory
special_conditions: 5-year O&M AMC option required in bid; Chemical supply bundling preferred; GPCB compliance guarantee
